examples: In Russia niello work is known as Tula work.
Nielli (objects decorated with niello) were produced in ancient Rome and 9th-century EnglanD. In Russia niello work is known as Tula work.
Niello: Black metallic alloy of sulfur with silver, copper, or lead, used to fill designs that have been engraved on the surface of a metal object, usually of silver.
